	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__cont_europe alias = hafp_g_cont_europe }

	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__f_culture_armenian alias = hafp_g_f_culture_armenian }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__f_culture_bengali alias = hafp_g_f_culture_bengali }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__f_culture_cham alias = hafp_g_f_culture_cham }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__f_culture_group_arabian alias = hafp_g_f_culture_group_arabian }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__f_culture_group_chinese alias = hafp_g_f_culture_group_chinese }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__f_culture_group_greek alias = hafp_g_f_culture_group_greek }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__f_culture_gujurati alias = hafp_g_f_culture_gujurati }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__f_culture_indian alias = hafp_g_f_culture_indian }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__f_culture_japan alias = hafp_g_f_culture_japan }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__f_culture_jurchen alias = hafp_g_f_culture_jurchen }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__f_culture_kannada_muslim alias = hafp_g_f_culture_kannada_muslim }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__f_culture_malayalam alias = hafp_g_f_culture_malayalam }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__f_culture_marathi alias = hafp_g_f_culture_marathi }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__f_culture_nepali alias = hafp_g_f_culture_nepali }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__f_culture_nomadic alias = hafp_g_f_culture_nomadic }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__f_culture_punjabi alias = hafp_g_f_culture_punjabi }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__f_culture_rajasthani alias = hafp_g_f_culture_rajasthani }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__f_culture_thai alias = hafp_g_f_culture_thai }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__f_culture_vietnamese alias = hafp_g_f_culture_vietnamese }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__f_culture_west_african alias = hafp_g_f_culture_west_african }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__f_culture_andean alias = hafp_g_f_culture_andean }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__f_culture_haudenosaunee alias = hafp_g_f_culture_haudenosaunee }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__f_culture_maori alias = hafp_g_f_culture_maori }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__f_religion_buddhist alias = hafp_g_f_religion_buddhist }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__f_religion_catholic alias = hafp_g_f_religion_catholic }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__f_religion_hellenism alias = hafp_g_f_religion_hellenism }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__f_religion_hindu alias = hafp_g_f_religion_hindu }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__f_religion_miaphysite alias = hafp_g_f_religion_miaphysite }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__f_religion_muslim alias = hafp_g_f_religion_muslim }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__f_religion_orthodox alias = hafp_g_f_religion_orthodox }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__f_religion_protestant alias = hafp_g_f_religion_protestant }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__f_religion_shinto alias = hafp_g_f_religion_shinto }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__f_government_monarchy alias = hafp_g_f_government_monarchy }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__f_government_republic alias = hafp_g_f_government_republic }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__f_government_steppe_horde alias = hafp_g_f_government_steppe_horde }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__f_government_theocracy alias = hafp_g_f_government_theocracy }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__f_colonial_nations alias = hafp_g_f_colonial_nations }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__f_estate_cossacks alias = hafp_g_f_estate_cossacks }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__enabled alias = hafp_enabled }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__unlock_all alias = hafp_all_advances_enabled }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__age_age_1_traditions alias = hafp_g_age_age_1_traditions }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__age_age_2_renaissance alias = hafp_g_age_age_2_renaissance }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__age_age_3_discovery alias = hafp_g_age_age_3_discovery }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__age_age_4_reformation alias = hafp_g_age_age_4_reformation }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__age_age_5_absolutism alias = hafp_g_age_age_5_absolutism }
	cmm_sync_bool_alias = { setting = hafp__age_age_6_revolutions alias = hafp_g_age_age_6_revolutions }
}

# Toggling a parent (continent / region / select-all) copies its new
# value onto every child toggle, then aliases are re-synced.
hafp_handle_callback = {
	if = {
		limit = { var:cmf_callback = flag:hafp__reg_balkan_region }
		if = {
			limit = { "variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__reg_balkan_region)" >= 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_aegean_archipelago_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_bosnia_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_bulgaria_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_croatia_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_macedonia_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_morea_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_northern_greece_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_serbia_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_slavonia_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_thrace_area value = 1 }
		}
		else = {
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_aegean_archipelago_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_bosnia_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_bulgaria_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_croatia_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_macedonia_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_morea_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_northern_greece_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_serbia_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_slavonia_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_thrace_area value = 0 }
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { var:cmf_callback = flag:hafp__reg_baltic_region }
		if = {
			limit = { "variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__reg_baltic_region)" >= 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_baltic_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_central_poland_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_greater_poland_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_lesser_poland_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_lithuania_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_mazovia_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_prussia_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_samogitia_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_silesia_area value = 1 }
		}
		else = {
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_baltic_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_central_poland_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_greater_poland_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_lesser_poland_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_lithuania_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_mazovia_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_prussia_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_samogitia_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_silesia_area value = 0 }
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { var:cmf_callback = flag:hafp__reg_great_britain_region }
		if = {
			limit = { "variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__reg_great_britain_region)" >= 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_hebrides_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_home_counties_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_scottish_lowlands_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_wales_area value = 1 }
		}
		else = {
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_hebrides_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_home_counties_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_scottish_lowlands_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_wales_area value = 0 }
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { var:cmf_callback = flag:hafp__reg_carpathia_region }
		if = {
			limit = { "variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__reg_carpathia_region)" >= 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_transdanubia_area value = 1 }
		}
		else = {
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_transdanubia_area value = 0 }
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { var:cmf_callback = flag:hafp__reg_caucasus_region }
		if = {
			limit = { "variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__reg_caucasus_region)" >= 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_armenia_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_armenian_highlands_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_georgia_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_shirvan_area value = 1 }
		}
		else = {
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_armenia_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_armenian_highlands_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_georgia_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_shirvan_area value = 0 }
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { var:cmf_callback = flag:hafp__reg_france_region }
		if = {
			limit = { "variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__reg_france_region)" >= 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_brittany_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_burgundy_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_normandy_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_provence_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_savoy_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_ile_de_france_area value = 1 }
		}
		else = {
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_brittany_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_burgundy_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_normandy_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_provence_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_savoy_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_ile_de_france_area value = 0 }
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { var:cmf_callback = flag:hafp__reg_iberia_region }
		if = {
			limit = { "variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__reg_iberia_region)" >= 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_granada_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_castile_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_catalonia_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_navarre_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_south_portugal_area value = 1 }
		}
		else = {
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_granada_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_castile_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_catalonia_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_navarre_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_south_portugal_area value = 0 }
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { var:cmf_callback = flag:hafp__reg_italy_region }
		if = {
			limit = { "variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__reg_italy_region)" >= 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_abruzzo_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_apulia_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_basilicata_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_campania_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_liguria_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_sicily_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_tuscany_area value = 1 }
		}
		else = {
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_abruzzo_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_apulia_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_basilicata_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_campania_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_liguria_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_sicily_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_tuscany_area value = 0 }
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { var:cmf_callback = flag:hafp__reg_north_atlantic_islands_region }
		if = {
			limit = { "variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__reg_north_atlantic_islands_region)" >= 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_iceland_area value = 1 }
		}
		else = {
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_iceland_area value = 0 }
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { var:cmf_callback = flag:hafp__reg_north_german_region }
		if = {
			limit = { "variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__reg_north_german_region)" >= 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_brabant_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_brandenburg_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_flanders_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_friesland_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_hesse_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_holland_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_holstein_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_lower_saxony_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_rhineland_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_upper_saxony_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_wallonia_area value = 1 }
		}
		else = {
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_brabant_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_brandenburg_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_flanders_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_friesland_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_hesse_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_holland_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_holstein_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_lower_saxony_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_rhineland_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_upper_saxony_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_wallonia_area value = 0 }
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { var:cmf_callback = flag:hafp__reg_steppes_region }
		if = {
			limit = { "variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__reg_steppes_region)" >= 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_azov_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_lower_don_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_matrega_area value = 1 }
		}
		else = {
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_azov_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_lower_don_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_matrega_area value = 0 }
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { var:cmf_callback = flag:hafp__reg_russian_region }
		if = {
			limit = { "variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__reg_russian_region)" >= 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_east_novgorod_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_moscow_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_smolensk_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_west_novgorod_area value = 1 }
		}
		else = {
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_east_novgorod_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_moscow_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_smolensk_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_west_novgorod_area value = 0 }
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { var:cmf_callback = flag:hafp__reg_ruthenia_region }
		if = {
			limit = { "variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__reg_ruthenia_region)" >= 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_left_bank_ukraine_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_polesia_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_red_ruthenia_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_right_bank_ukraine_area value = 1 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_volhynia_area value = 1 }
		}
		else = {
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_left_bank_ukraine_area value = 0 }
			add_to_variable_map = { name = cmm key = flag:hafp__area_polesia_area value = 0 }

		}

			limit = { "variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__reg_central_america_region)" >= 1 }

		else = {

	}
	if = {
		limit = { var:cmf_callback = flag:hafp__reg_east_coast_region }

		}
	}
	hafp_sync_aliases = yes
	# Record every toggle/scope change in the CMF Mod Action Log
	if = {
		limit = { var:cmf_callback = flag:hafp__cont_europe }
		if = {
			limit = { "variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__cont_europe)" >= 1 }
			cmf_log_with_args = { action = hafp_log_turned_on arg1 = hafp__cont_europe_name arg2 = hafp_log_suffix }
		}
		else = {
			cmf_log_with_args = { action = hafp_log_turned_off arg1 = hafp__cont_europe_name arg2 = hafp_log_suffix }
		}
	}

		limit = { var:cmf_callback = flag:hafp__reg_balkan_region }

		}

		limit = { var:cmf_callback = flag:hafp__area_aegean_archipelago_area }

		}
	}
	if = {

		}
		else = {
			cmf_log_with_args = { action = hafp_log_turned_off arg1 = hafp__age_age_6_revolutions_name arg2 = hafp_log_suffix }
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { var:cmf_callback = flag:hafp__research_scope }
		cmf_log_with_args = { action = hafp_log_changed arg1 = hafp__research_scope_name arg2 = hafp_log_suffix }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { var:cmf_callback = flag:hafp__research_custom }
		hafp_research_custom = yes
		cmf_log = { action = hafp_log_research_custom }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { var:cmf_callback = flag:hafp__research_all }
		hafp_research_all = yes
		cmf_log = { action = hafp_log_research_all }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { var:cmf_callback = flag:hafp__research_current_era }
		hafp_research_current_era = yes
		cmf_log = { action = hafp_log_research_current_era }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { var:cmf_callback = flag:hafp__research_previous_eras }
		hafp_research_previous_eras = yes
		cmf_log = { action = hafp_log_research_previous_eras }
	}
}
